prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild scene, Celestia Vale in a modest travel dress and Ren Mistfell in a tool-belt apron; Celestia points to glowing magical residue spilled from a crate on a workbench, Ren gestures for caution and begins pulling on protective leather gloves, warm tavern lighting, anime style, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; after ten seconds Ren uses long iron tongs to carefully lift a shimmering crystal shard from the residue, placing it into a lead-lined box while Celestia watches with focused interest, consistent characters and camera, no text, no watermark.
